programmes.show_name: Once Upon a Time in Tsavo
programmes.show_description: A Time of Plenty: Dust, sand and blistering heat - it's dry season in Tsavo. The drought makes life difficult. This episode shows how the rare, but heavy rains, affect Kenyan ecosystem.
